Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIyMzkxNGM5Yi04NTdiLTQ4ODYtOTRmNy0yM2Y5Nzg4MzliMzMiLCJ1c2VybmFtZSI6InRlc3R1c2VyIiwiZXhwIjoxNzc1MDIyMjY1LCJ0eXBlIjoiYWNjZXNzIn0.jXikoejUqeHoTlufbjk8X4MkfLFuQ22CmNmpUxAfd7U"
PROBLEM_ID="733d460e-e35e-414f-8051-0f7eb1c9f04e"
curl -s "http://localhost:8001/api/v1/problems/$PROBLEM_ID" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f\\"Title: {d.get\('title'\)}\\nDifficulty: {d.get\('difficulty'\)}\\nTime limit: {d.get\('time_limit'\)}ms\\nMemory limit: {d.get\('memory_limit'\)}MB\\nDescription: {d.get\('description', ''\)[:200]}...\\"\)")

Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiIyMzkxNGM5Yi04NTdiLTQ4ODYtOTRmNy0yM2Y5Nzg4MzliMzMiLCJ1c2VybmFtZSI6InRlc3R1c2VyIiwiZXhwIjoxNzc1MDIyMjY1LCJ0eXBlIjoiYWNjZXNzIn0.jXikoejUqeHoTlufbjk8X4MkfLFuQ22CmNmpUxAfd7U"
curl -X POST http://localhost:8001/api/v1/submissions/run -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"problem_id":"91243592-62b8-438f-b74a-07a684fb3563","language":"python","code":"import sys\\nimport ast\\n\\nlines = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\(\\"\\\\n\\"\)\\nnums = ast.literal_eval\(lines[0]\)\\ntarget = int\(lines[1]\)\\n\\nhashmap = {}\\nfor i, num in enumerate\(nums\):\\n    complement = target - num\\n    if complement in hashmap:\\n        print\([hashmap[complement], i]\)\\n        break\\n    hashmap[num] = i\\n"}' 2>/dev/null)

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec fastoj-postgres psql -U fastoj -d fastoj -c "SELECT input, output FROM testcases WHERE problem_id = '9efb2f3c-f426-452b-87e1-8c7e8dd19d39';")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec fastoj-postgres psql -U fastoj -d fastoj -c "SELECT tc.input, tc.output, tc.is_hidden FROM testcases tc WHERE tc.problem_id = '9efb2f3c-f426-452b-87e1-8c7e8dd19d39' ORDER BY tc.is_hidden, tc.id;")
